description: CompositionPurple shorts made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, comfortable elastic waistband and embroidery on the left sideFitRegularWash careHand or machine wash cold with a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyTumble dry lowDry in shadeDo not bleachWarm ironIf you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these shorts from urban yoga belong in your wardrobe. The fabric is breathable, and the waistband is soft. Team it up with a cool T-shirt and an excellent pair of shoes to hit the road.Model statisticsThe product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26"
